name: Dr. Preethi Srinivasan
achievement: Founder of Soulfree, National Swimming Champion
text: Anna Adarsh was where my journey of resilience began. The support I received here shaped my perspective on leadership and service.

name: Sowmya Ramakrishnan
text: The technical foundation and the confidence I gained at Anna Adarsh were instrumental in my career at top tech firms.

name: Roshni Khatri
text: Being part of the student council taught me more about management than any textbook ever could. It's a vibrant community!

name: Meenakshi Sundaram
text: The entrepreneurship cell at college gave me the wings to start my own sustainable fashion brand right after graduation.
